symptoms_text: I have itchy, dry patches on my hands that become worse after washing dishes or using soap. The skin feels rough but does not ooze.
There are small dry, flaky patches on my cheeks that sometimes look lighter than the surrounding skin.
My eyelids feel itchy and irritated with mild redness, especially after using new cosmetic products.
I have red, itchy patches on my arms and legs that sometimes ooze fluid and form crusts after scratching.
My skin has thickened and darkened in areas where I keep scratching due to persistent itching.
There are coin-shaped itchy patches on my legs that are scaly and sometimes painful.
Large areas of my skin are red, inflamed, and extremely itchy. The skin oozes and cracks, making daily activities difficult.
More than half of my body is affected by itchy, red, thickened skin with scaling and fissures that bleed.
I have constant intense itching that keeps me awake at night, along with widespread redness and skin thickening.
I have small blackheads and whiteheads on my face, mainly on my nose and forehead. My skin feels oily but there is no pain.
There are tiny bumps on my cheeks and chin that keep appearing. They are not painful but make my skin look uneven.
My skin is oily and I often notice whiteheads around my nose and mouth area.
I have red pimples and pus-filled bumps on my face and upper back. The skin is inflamed and sometimes painful.
My acne has spread to my chest and shoulders. The pimples are swollen and leave dark marks after healing.
I experience frequent breakouts with red bumps on my cheeks and jawline, and the skin feels sore.
I have large painful bumps under my skin that feel deep and inflamed. Some of them leave scars after healing.
My acne is very painful with nodules and cysts on my face and back. The skin is red, swollen, and sensitive.
I have deep cystic acne that causes constant pain and leaves permanent scars on my skin.
I have small red patches on my elbows and knees with thin white scales. The itching is mild and manageable.
There are dry, flaky patches on my scalp that shed scales but do not cause much pain.
I notice thin red plaques with light scaling on my arms that become worse when my skin is dry.
I have well-defined red plaques with silvery scales on my elbows, knees, and lower back. The itching is frequent.
My scalp and ears have thick scaling and redness. Scratching sometimes causes pinpoint bleeding.
I have painful cracks on my palms and soles with thickened skin that makes daily activities uncomfortable.
Large thick plaques with heavy silvery scales cover my back, arms, and legs. The skin cracks and bleeds.
My skin is red and inflamed over most of my body with severe itching that affects my sleep.
I have nail pitting, yellow discoloration, and joint pain along with thick scaly skin patches.
I have small white patches on my hands and around my mouth. They are not painful but are clearly lighter than my normal skin.
There are pale patches on my eyelids and fingers that slowly appeared over time without itching or pain.
I notice small depigmented spots on my arms that become more visible when my surrounding skin tans.
White patches have spread across my face and neck. The borders are clearly defined and contrast strongly with my skin tone.
I have symmetrical white patches on both hands and feet that have gradually increased in size over several months.
Depigmented patches have appeared in my armpits and groin area. They are asymptomatic but spreading slowly.
Large areas of my skin on the face, trunk, and limbs have lost all pigment, causing significant contrast and emotional distress.
Most of my body has depigmented patches, including my hands, feet, and face. Some of my hair in these areas has turned white.
I have extensive vitiligo affecting nearly my entire body surface, with loss of skin pigment and whitening of eyebrows and scalp hair.
I have itchy, scaly skin between my toes with mild redness. The skin sometimes peels but there is no pain.
There are light-colored patches on my upper chest and back that become more noticeable after sun exposure.
I have mild itching and redness in my groin area, especially after sweating.
I have round, red, itchy patches with raised borders on my arms that keep spreading slowly.
My scalp has scaly patches with hair breakage and itching. Some areas appear swollen.
The skin on my soles and sides of my feet is thick, cracked, and itchy, making walking uncomfortable.
I have painful swelling with pus-filled areas on my scalp, along with hair loss and tenderness.
My nails have become thick, yellow, brittle, and are lifting from the nail bed, causing discomfort.
I have widespread red, scaly, and itchy patches over large areas of my body that are not responding to creams.
I have itchy, scaly skin between my toes with mild redness. The skin sometimes peels but there is no pain.
There are light-colored patches on my upper chest and back that become more noticeable after sun exposure.
I have mild itching and redness in my groin area, especially after sweating.
I have round, red, itchy patches with raised borders on my arms that keep spreading slowly.
My scalp has scaly patches with hair breakage and itching. Some areas appear swollen.
The skin on my soles and sides of my feet is thick, cracked, and itchy, making walking uncomfortable.
I have painful swelling with pus-filled areas on my scalp, along with hair loss and tenderness.
My nails have become thick, yellow, brittle, and are lifting from the nail bed, causing discomfort.
I have widespread red, scaly, and itchy patches over large areas of my body that are not responding to creams.
My cheeks and nose often become red and flushed, especially after hot drinks or sun exposure. The redness fades after some time.
I notice mild redness in the center of my face with occasional warmth and sensitivity, but no pimples.
My face gets red easily when I exercise or feel stressed, and my skin feels sensitive and dry.
I have persistent redness on my cheeks and nose along with small red bumps and pus-filled spots.
There are visible blood vessels on my face, and I frequently develop inflamed pimples that look like acne.
My face feels burning and stinging with ongoing redness and flare-ups that last for days.
My face is constantly red with thickened skin and swollen areas, especially on my nose.
I have severe facial redness with painful bumps and eye irritation, including dryness and burning.
My skin is red, swollen, and sensitive most of the time, and the symptoms are affecting my confidence and daily life.
I have a small rough bump on my finger that feels hard and looks grainy. It does not hurt but is slowly growing.
There are flat, skin-colored bumps on my face that appeared after shaving. They are not painful.
I have a small wart near my fingernail that feels rough but does not cause discomfort.
I have multiple rough, raised warts on my hands and knees that sometimes catch on clothing.
There is a painful wart on the sole of my foot that hurts when I walk or stand for long periods.
I have several flat warts spreading in a line on my arms after scratching the skin.
I have large clusters of warts on my feet that are very painful and interfere with walking.
The warts around my nails have caused nail damage and deformity, making daily tasks difficult.
I have numerous warts across my hands and arms that keep spreading despite treatment.
I noticed a new mole on my arm that looks different from my other moles and has uneven edges.
There is a small dark spot on my leg that has multiple shades of brown and black.
A mole on my back has grown larger over the past few months and has become irregular in shape.
I have a raised dark lesion that sometimes itches and occasionally bleeds.
The mole on my skin has rapidly increased in size, changed color, and started bleeding without injury.
I have a dark, painful skin lesion with irregular borders along with swelling of nearby lymph nodes.
